data.title: RGC Resources, Inc. will hold its Q1 2026 earnings call on Feb 10, 2026 at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Visit https://www.rgcresources.com for presentation materials.
data.description: In Roanoke, Virginia, on January 28, 2026, RGC Resources, Inc. (Nasdaq: RGCO) announced its upcoming quarterly conference call and webcast regarding its fiscal first quarter 2026 results. This event is scheduled for Tuesday, February 10, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Presentation materials will be accessible on the company's website in advance of the call on the Investor & Financial Information page at https://www.rgcresources.com/investor-financial-information/.

data.title: RAYUS Radiology renews partnerships with US Ski & Snowboard, US Speedskating, and USA Bobsled/Skeleton, remaining their Official Medical Provider.
data.description: A major leader in national medical imaging services, RAYUS Radiology, has recently announced their continuation as an Official Medical Provider for all three main US winter sports organizations. This includes providing advanced diagnostic and interventional medical imaging services. The agreement, effective from January 28, 2026, solidifies RAYUS Radiology's prominent role in supporting winter sports in the United States.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, and Dogecoin stable after Fed holds rates. Bitcoin at $89,596, Ethereum $3,023, XRP $1.91, DOGE $0.1255. 90,316 traders liquidated, losing $281.97 million in 24 hours. Sentiment cautious despite gains for Hyperliquid, DoubleZero, Canton.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently trading below $90,000, standing at $89,596, while Ethereum is at $3,023, Solana at $126.06, XRP at $1.91, Dogecoin at $0.1255, and Shiba Inu at $0.057737. The Federal Reserve has maintained the expected interest rate hold, influencing the market. Coinglass data reveals that 90,316 traders were liquidated in the past day, totaling $281.97 million. Hyperliquid, DoubleZero, and Canton were among the gainers in the last 24 hours. The cautious sentiment towards Bitcoin and Ethereum is notable, contrasting with the performance of Gold and Silver. For more details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Coinbase introduces prediction markets in the US, powered by Kalshi for American customers.
data.description: A popular United States-based cryptocurrency exchange, Coinbase, has introduced its prediction markets product, utilizing technology from Kalshi.

data.title: OnePay launches free in-app tax filing for customers, simplifying taxes and payments. NEW YORK, Jan. 28, 2026 /PRNewswire.
data.description: OnePay Cash users now have the convenience of filing their taxes, directing refunds to OnePay Cash, and settling outstanding payments all within the OnePay app. The announcement was made in New York on January 28, 2026. OnePay, a leading consumer fintech platform, with millions of American users, aims to streamline the tax process for its customers.

data.title: Precision Additive launches PA-300, fastest AI LPBF 3D metal printer. Produces high-quality components.
data.description: In Noblesville, Indiana, on January 28, 2026, Precision Additive revealed the release of their inaugural metal additive manufacturing machine, the PA-300. This new laser powder bed fusion (LPBF) printer is engineered to create top-notch, certification-ready parts. The PA-300 aims to revolutionize the production process, offering advanced capabilities to cater to a variety of needs in the industry.

data.title: Voyager Ventures closes $275M Fund II for investments in advanced energy, materials production, AI, targeting industrial growth.
data.description: A recent announcement revealed that Voyager Ventures has launched a new fund, Fund II, with a substantial investment of $275 million. This fund will be focused on financing advanced energy systems, materials production, and applied artificial intelligence to drive industrial growth. The fund will primarily target energy, industrials, and climate technology sectors. The announcement was made in San Francisco, New York, and London on January 28, 2026.

data.title: Forrester Research (Nasdaq: FORR) to broadcast Q4 and full-year earnings call on Feb 12, 2026 at 4:30pm ET. Log on 15 mins prior at Forrester.com.
data.description: Forrester Research, Inc. (Nasdaq: FORR) from Cambridge, Massachusetts, will conduct a live broadcast of its Q4 and full-year earnings conference call on February 12, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. ET. The call can be accessed on Forrester.com. Interested investors are advised to log in 15 minutes before the start time. Pre-registration is available for participants to guarantee the required audio applications are set up correctly. Additional details can be found on their website.

data.title: Western Digital stock rises after Seagate's strong Q2 results. Seagate reported earnings of $3.11 per share on revenue of $2.82 billion, exceeding expectations. Seagate also generated $723 million in operating cash flow and $607 million in free cash flow.
data.description: Shares of Western Digital Corp (NASDAQ: WDC) are seeing an uptick as investors respond to the robust performance of Seagate Technology Holdings (NASDAQ: STX). Seagate reported adjusted earnings of $3.11 per share for the second quarter, surpassing the consensus estimate of $2.81. Revenue stood at $2.82 billion, exceeding expectations. The company achieved a non-GAAP gross margin of 42.2% and generated $723 million in operating cash flow along with $607 million in free cash flow. Seagate also provided optimistic guidance for the third quarter. This development has set a new benchmark, just ahead of Western Digital's forthcoming earnings release.

data.title: Mountain Lake Acquisition Corp. II closes $360 million IPO with 36 million units sold at $10 each. CEO: Paul Grinberg, CFO: Douglas Horlick.
data.description: Incline Village, Nevada, on January 28, 2026, Mountain Lake Acquisition Corp. II completed its upsized initial public offering of 36,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit. The offering, which included 4,680,000 units issued due to the underwriters exercising their over-allotment option, secured gross proceeds of $360,000,000. The Company, a special purpose acquisition company led by CEO Paul Grinberg and CFO Douglas Horlick, is a newly formed entity based in the Cayman Islands.

data.title: Backflow expert Paul J. Whittemore explains testing rules for 2026 in HelloNation. Important for commercial properties & water systems in New Hampshire & New England.
data.description: In Manchester, New Hampshire, on January 28, 2026, a new article discusses the importance of backflow testing for commercial properties and municipal water systems across New England. The featured expert, Paul J. Whittemore from New England Backflow, Inc., provides insights into the testing requirements. This information is crucial for entities aiming to comply with regulations and ensure the safety of water systems in the region.

data.title: Coinbase introduces prediction markets in all US states through Kalshi, covering sports, politics, culture, and more.
data.description: Coinbase has revealed its intention to expand into prediction markets over 30 days ago. The company is set to introduce a new offering encompassing various categories such as sports, politics, culture, and others.
Fed's Powell: So far economy has pulled through well despite big changes in trade policy.

data.title: BlackRock, Inc. increases stake in Pandora A/S; now holds 6,698,804 shares (8.47% total voting rights) and controls 10.03%.
data.description: Pandora A/S has officially disclosed, as mandated by the Capital Markets Act, that BlackRock, Inc. currently possesses 6,698,804 shares, representing 8.47% of both the total voting rights and share capital. This is an increase from their previous holding of 7.92%. Furthermore, BlackRock, Inc. now exercises control over voting rights linked to financial instruments equating to 1.55%, up from 0.42% before. This brings BlackRock, Inc.'s total voting rights influence over the company to 10.03%, a notable rise from the previous 8.34%.
Fed's Powell: I am clear-eyed about the possibility that higher productivity may persist, or may not.
